title: Playground Agency Task Board
concept: A kanban-style agency workflow where Create, Save, Manage, Inspect, Export, and Debug lanes expose every current Playground capability, while a command/search overlay and result pane show exact inputs, progress, saved state, and consequences for the selected task.
focus: task-board workflow for agency developers testing client sites
command/search overlay plus selected-task results pane
friendly beginner UI with restrained color blocks
live WordPress preview embedded as a board card
complete flow proof for launch, save, manage, reset, export, and import consequences
flows: Select a launch source from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, .zip import, featured Blueprint shortcuts, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress and resulting saved identity.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds, including open, rename, delete, storage location, and creation date states.
Use Site Manager tasks for settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs while the live site remains visible on the board.
Export to GitHub, download as .zip, copy or download Blueprint bundles, download database.sqlite, and show import-over-current-site results.
Browse the Blueprint gallery with category filters, search, a dense real-name catalog, selected Blueprint detail, inspect JSON, copy URL, and run behavior.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty state
